title: How to win public support for financial climate policies: both climate anxiety and economic anticipation work
authors: Yang Li, Yuxuan Liang, Jianchi Tian, Yan Sun, Meijun Meng

tax_mentions.context: The study tests determinants of public support for carbon tax alongside ILBRS and green credit system in China.
tax_mentions.page_or_section: Abstract; 1.1 Financial climate policies; 3.1 Results for CT support

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: This is a reward/incentive system, not a tax instrument.
This is a credit/loan policy, not a carbon or fuel tax.

inclusion_reason: Directly analyzes public support for carbon tax and its determinants in a longitudinal survey; carbon tax is a focal policy outcome, not just a generic tax mention.
